query: Look at /tmp/danxbot-test-system6.log and tell me what the test results were.
Summarize the failures from the latest CI run on PR #142 — the build-log artifact is at /tmp/ci-build-log.txt.
What is broken about the dispatch round-trip for DX-244 — the JSONL shows the agent stopped responding but the worker still reports running.
Why is the dispatch agent stuck on DX-244?
Dig into why src/__tests__/system/run-system-tests.sh is taking 8 minutes instead of the usual 2 — the change landed yesterday.
How does SessionLogWatcher detect a stalled agent?
What config value is used for the worker port in production — is it the same DANXBOT_WORKER_PORT env var or does the deploy target override it?
Three tests in src/poller/index.test.ts are failing — figure out what changed.
The deploy to gpt this morning introduced a regression in the dashboard auth flow — login returns 401 for the monitor account. What happened?
Report on the failed dispatches over the last 24 hours — the dashboard shows 7 with status=failed and 2 with status=critical_failure.
List the files in src/agent/.
Grep for 'spawnAgent' across the codebase to see every callsite.
Show me lines 100-200 of src/poller/index.ts.
Rename the function `foo` to `bar` in src/baz.ts and update every callsite.
Move dispatchTagFor from src/skill-eval/run.ts to a new module src/skill-eval/tags.ts — keep the same signature.
Fix the typo 'recieved' → 'received' in the comments of src/dispatch/core.ts.
Update the JSDoc on getJobStatus to document the four cache-related token fields it returns.
Add a new --dry-run flag to the skill-eval runner that prints the dispatch payload without POSTing it.
Build a new dashboard tab that shows per-skill trigger rates from the latest eval-set runs.
Tell me the test results from /tmp/danxbot-all-passing.log — it should show 145 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors.
